claim_rule.denominator_policy: candidate_score_denominator=true marks current v3 standalone core L1/L2/L3 tasks with EVAS gold+negative evidence, excluding support-formal, SX/NA language rows, and retained spectre-divergent rows. counted_in_score remains false until the v3 score policy is explicitly frozen.
